patterns_discovered: Proactive error logging in Playwright runner
Network and console error tracking before test navigation
gotchas_discovered: Need to handle errors that occur before test execution
Importance of capturing both console and network errors
Tracking HTTP status codes >= 400 as potential failures

approach_outcome.primary_goal: Add page.on() event listeners to capture errors

recommendations: Extend error tracking to include more detailed error metadata
Consider adding a mechanism to fail tests based on captured errors
Implement a structured error reporting system for test runs
